sites.name: CapCut
sites.description: Desktop video editing with a wide feature set on the free tier. Also strong for background removal without a subscription.

sites.name: DaVinci Resolve
sites.description: Professional-grade video editor and color suite. Worth exploring if you outgrow browser-first tools.

sites.name: MP3 Juices
sites.description: Extract audio from YouTube URLs when you have the rights to do so. Use only where downloading is legal.

sites.name: AnyFlip
sites.description: Download PDFs from supported flipbook and magazine sites when you need an offline copy.

sites.name: Color Hex
sites.description: Palette suggestions and predefined color schemes. Handy when you need inspiration beyond a single swatch.

sites.name: MyFonts
sites.description: Large font catalog for browsing families, weights, and licensing before you commit to a typeface.

sites.name: Text Studio
sites.description: Generates well-known display and logo-style text effects without hunting for scattered download links.

sites.name: Canva
sites.description: Templates for ads, slides, and social graphics. The free tier covers a lot if you stay inside their layouts.

sites.name: Adobe Lightroom
sites.description: Photo editing with an approachable panel layout. Good for learning curves and batch adjustments.

sites.name: remove.bg
sites.description: Fast background removal. Quality drops on the free tier; paid plans if you need print-ready edges.

sites.name: Cleanup.pictures
sites.description: Paint out unwanted objects from photos. Simple brush workflow for quick touch-ups.

sites.name: Upscale Media
sites.description: AI upscaling for small or soft images. Results vary by source, but it can rescue usable assets.

sites.name: Borderize
sites.description: Add borders around transparent PNGs. Useful for stickers, badges, and meme frames.

sites.name: TinyPNG
sites.description: Lossy compression for PNG and JPEG. Shrink assets before you ship them to the web or chat.

sites.name: Bulk Resize Photos
sites.description: Resize many images at once with no arbitrary batch cap on the free flow.

sites.name: AutoCropper
sites.description: Batch crop with coordinates you can reuse in CLI pipelines. Helpful when you need repeatable crops.

sites.name: iLoveIMG
sites.description: Straightforward crop, compress, and convert tools in one place. Good for one-off image chores.

sites.name: PhotoAiD
sites.description: Round crops, background removal, and ID-photo style tools. Free tier with the usual ad-supported tradeoff.

sites.name: Unsplash
sites.description: Free high-resolution photos with clear licensing. Easier than digging through legacy stock sites.

sites.name: Wallpaper Access
sites.description: Wallpapers including 4K sets. The 4k-space category is a solid starting point for presentations.

sites.name: Wallpaper Cave
sites.description: Another wallpaper archive. Useful for themed sets (e.g. game art for slide backgrounds).

sites.name: Dark Souls Text Generator
sites.description: Renders the iconic Dark Souls lettering style for images and thumbnails.

sites.name: Solid Color Image Generator
sites.description: Outputs a flat-color image at the dimensions you specify. Does exactly what the name says.

sites.name: Tree Generator
sites.description: Builds folder-tree diagrams for docs and READMEs. Easier than hand-aligning ASCII in a slide.

sites.name: GIPHY Capture
sites.description: Record the screen and export a GIF. Desktop app from GIPHY for quick captures.

sites.name: EZGIF
sites.description: Create, resize, optimize, and repair GIFs in the browser. Swiss-army knife for short animations.

sites.name: loading.io
sites.description: Spinner and loading animations from icons. Export GIFs or CSS for prototypes.

sites.name: FreeIcons
sites.description: Browse and download icon packs. Filter by style before you import into a design tool.

sites.name: Flaticon
sites.description: Large icon library with static and animated assets. Search filters help narrow color vs line style.

sites.name: App Icon Maker
sites.description: Generate mobile app icon sizes from one master image. Exports the common iOS and Android grids.

sites.name: Metatags.io
sites.description: Preview and copy meta tag snippets for SEO and social sharing.

sites.name: OpenGraph.xyz
sites.description: See how a URL will look when shared on social networks before you publish.

sites.name: Capitalize My Title
sites.description: Title-case and capitalization helpers tuned for YouTube and search-friendly headlines.

sites.name: Suno
sites.description: Generate or extend music with AI. Quality varies; browse community examples before you commit.

sites.name: EaseUS Vocal Remover
sites.description: Split vocals from instrumentals in uploaded tracks. Handy for karaoke or remix experiments.

sites.name: Hacker Typer
sites.description: Type anything and look like a movie hacker. Pure morale for demos and stream overlays.

sites.name: What the Commit
sites.description: Random humorous git commit messages when inspiration runs dry.

sites.name: tldr pages
sites.description: Community-maintained command examples—like man pages, but oriented toward copy-paste usage.

sites.name: cheat.sh
sites.description: Dense cheat sheets for languages and tools. Less polished than tldr, more examples per topic.

sites.name: DXOMARK
sites.description: Camera and lens test scores. Strong reference when you compare phone or DSLR sensors.

sites.name: Fragrantica
sites.description: Perfume database with notes, dupes, and reviews. Useful for finding similar scents.

sites.name: RTINGS
sites.description: Lab-style reviews for TVs, monitors, headphones, and more. Measurements you can compare side by side.

sites.name: Excalidraw
sites.description: Hand-drawn style whiteboards in the browser. Fast enough for architecture sketches and incident diagrams.

sites.name: tldraw
sites.description: Minimal infinite canvas with multiplayer. Good when you want a board without installing anything.

sites.name: draw.io
sites.description: Diagrams.net in the browser or desktop. AWS, GCP, and K8s stencils when you need proper boxes and arrows.

sites.name: Convex
sites.description: TypeScript backend with realtime sync, auth, and server functions—no separate API layer to wire up.

sites.name: Airtable
sites.description: Spreadsheet-style bases with views, automations, and interfaces for ops and content teams.

sites.name: Tailscale
sites.description: WireGuard-based mesh VPN for secure access to homelab, cloud, and office resources without legacy VPN pain.

sites.name: DB Browser for SQLite
sites.description: Visual editor for SQLite files. Handy for local prototypes and quick data peeks.

sites.name: ngrok
sites.description: Expose a local port with a public URL. Webhooks and mobile testing without VPN gymnastics.
